mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_info(team_name, captain_id, max_members, apply_topic, expected_members, reserve_until, status, create_time) VALUES(#{teamName}, #{captainId}, #{expectedMembers}, #{applyTopic}, #{expectedMembers}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE), #{status}, NOW())
INSERT INTO team_member(team_id, student_id, role_in_team, join_time) VALUES(#{teamId}, #{studentId}, #{roleInTeam}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tm.member_id, tm.team_id, tm.student_id, tm.role_in_team, tm.task, tm.join_time, s.real_name FROM team_member tm LEFT JOIN student_account s ON tm.student_id = s.student_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_invite(team_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, status) VALUES(#{teamId}, #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, 'pending')
mapper.select: SELECT invite_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, team_id, status FROM team_invite WHERE invitee_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.captain_id, t.max_members, t.apply_topic, t.expected_members, t.reserve_until, t.status, t.create_time FROM team_info t INNER JOIN team_member m ON t.team_id = m.team_id WHERE m.student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId}

SELECT team_id, team_name, captain_id, max_members, apply_topic, expected_members, reserve_until, status, create_time FROM team_info WHERE status = 'forming' AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)

SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.captain_id, t.max_members, t.apply_topic, t.expected_members, t.reserve_until, t.status, t.create_time FROM team_info t INNER JOIN student_account captain ON t.captain_id = captain.student_id WHERE t.status = 'forming' AND captain.class_id = #{classId} AND (t.apply_topic LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.captain_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.id, jr.student_id, s.real_name as studentName, jr.reason, jr.status, jr.create_time FROM team_join_request jr JOIN student_account s ON jr.student_id = s.student_id WHERE jr.team_id = #{teamId} AND jr.status = 'pending' ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_join_request(team_id, student_id, reason, status) VALUES(#{teamId}, #{studentId}, #{reason}, 'pending')
mapper.select: SELECT student_id, real_name, class_id FROM student_account WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND (student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 20
SELECT real_name FROM student_account WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT class_id FROM student_account WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
